allow: PowerShell(cd "C:\\GitHub Clones\\saven_web"; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { cd "C:\\GitHub Clones\\saven_web"; npx next dev 2>&1 }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; Receive-Job $job)

PowerShell(cd "C:\\GitHub Clones\\saven_web"; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { cd "C:\\GitHub Clones\\saven_web"; npx next dev 2>&1 }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; $html = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing; $html.Content | Select-String -Pattern "stylesheet|_next/static|globals|\\.css" | Select-Object -First 10; Stop-Job $job)

PowerShell(cd "C:\\GitHub Clones\\saven_web"; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { cd "C:\\GitHub Clones\\saven_web"; npx next dev 2>&1 }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; $css = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/_next/static/css/app/layout.css" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "CSS size: $\($css.Content.Length\) bytes"; $css.Content | Select-String "dark-950|gold-500|bg-dark|text-gold" | Select-Object -First 5; Stop-Job $job)
